_comment: Department -> sub-topic tree for the OFM research knowledge base. Findings are tagged with a department key + free-form topic; this tree gives the top-level navigation and maps each department to the matching Palm baseline section (docs/palm-operating-system.md). Editable.

departments.label: Acquisition & Signing
departments.blurb: Finding and signing creators/models: cold outreach, DMs, offers, niches, qualification.

departments.label: Instagram Marketing
departments.blurb: IG growth, reels, account warming, shadowbans/flagging, conversion to OF.
departments.palm_section: §1/§4 (MATURE social pipeline; warmup mature for AI)

departments.label: Traffic & Distribution
departments.blurb: Driving fans to OF across platforms: Reddit, X/Twitter, TikTok, Snapchat, Threads, mass-DM.

departments.label: Content Production
departments.blurb: Producing social + OF content: productized sets, character/persona, reskinning, volume vs branding.

departments.label: Chatting / DM Monetization
departments.blurb: Selling in DMs: funnels, scripts, fan tiers, PPV sequencing, objection handling, sexting.
departments.palm_section: §8 (OUTSOURCED — capture as build-toward for in-house + AI chat)

departments.label: Pricing & PPV
departments.blurb: What to charge: PPV ladders, anchoring, tip menus, commission/deal structure.

departments.label: Retention & Churn
departments.blurb: Keeping creators (and fans): model retention, win-back, success cadence, churn signals.

departments.label: Agency Systems & Ops
departments.blurb: How the agency runs: productization, SOPs, dashboards/KPIs, software stack, fulfillment.

departments.label: Founder & Scaling
departments.blurb: Operator-level: financial modeling, revenue quality, plateaus ($100k/$300k/$1M), mindset.
departments.palm_section: §0/§7/§10 (no documented financial model or unit economics)

departments.label: Hiring & Delegation
departments.blurb: Building the team: hiring VAs/chatters/closers, A-players, replacing yourself, org structure.
departments.palm_section: §10 (THIN — roles in Clerk, no hiring playbook)

departments.label: Platform Risk & Compliance
departments.blurb: Bans, account creation at scale, trust scores, proxies, reddit/email account farming.

departments.label: AI Creators (Future)
departments.blurb: AI/synthetic creators on Fanvue etc. Not Palm's current business — kept as build-toward. Note overlaps with real-creator work.
departments.palm_section: §3 (AI personas funnel to OF; full AI-creator/Fanvue line is future)
